description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced JavaScript skills, focusing on the native `Date` API's complexities, including formatting, localization, and time zone handling. It uses a challenging yet humorous tone to engage developers often reliant on third-party libraries. The difficulty level is high, emphasizing practical mastery over theoretical knowledge.
Topics: JavaScript Date object methods, Date formatting, Time zone management, Localization techniques, Common pitfalls of native Date API
Audience: JavaScript developers seeking to deepen their understanding of the native Date API and reduce dependency on external libraries
